history.content:
<thought>
I am on the second row near the left side, facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so I should not move forward. I need to turn to find a safe path along the open floor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up at the top-left area, so moving forward would hit the wall. To get around the lava and toward the open corridor, I should turn right to face the open path to the east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am back facing right, but the cell ahead is lava, so I need a different direction. The open space below appears reachable, so I should turn right to face down and look for a safe route.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down and the cell below is open floor, so I can move forward safely to continue around the obstacles.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I moved down one row and am still facing down. The path ahead is blocked by lava, so I should turn left to face right and head along the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, and the cell directly ahead is open floor. Moving forward advances me toward the open path leading around the lava toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
